emails.subject: FW: Follow Up - Amarillo Meeting
emails.body: fyi. I am following -up on this. To: Harris, Steven

emails.subject: RE: Follow Up - Amarillo Meeting
emails.body: RE: Follow Up Amarillo Meeting Steve, What was the Oneok issue? What does Ann mean by "ETS was releasing gas to Oneok"? To: Watson, Kimberly; Lokay, Michelle

emails.subject: RE: Follow Up - Amarillo Meeting
emails.body: I have no idea. It doesn't make sense and I am waiting for the field to explain. To: Harris, Steven
